articles.author: Livemint
articles.title: India’s clean energy transition moves from technology to execution
articles.description: India's clean energy transition focuses on execution and scaling, with startups and enterprises collaborating. The Schneider Electric India Innovation Summit emphasised the importance of coordination, financing, and technology in achieving energy goals.
articles.content:
India's clean energy transition is no longer about adoption. It is about scale. And scale now depends on execution with speed and consistency.
Startups bring speed. Enterprises bring scale. Ecosyste… [+5066 chars]

articles.title: Is a college education still worth it in India?
